description: Add task statuses so users can track whether work is pending, in progress, or done.

userStories.title: Add task status schema and migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a status column on the tasks table defaulting to 'pending' so that statuses can be persisted.
acceptanceCriteria: Status column added to tasks table
Allowed values are pending, in progress, and done

userStories.title: Add backend action to update task status
userStories.description: As a user, I want the backend to support updating a task's status so that progress is saved.

userStories.title: Show status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the current status badge on task cards so that I know its progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control to task rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task's status from the task list so that I can easily update my work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list row has a control to change status
Selecting a new status triggers the backend update
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status filter to task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can see only relevant tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list includes a filter for status
Selecting a status updates the list to show only matching tasks
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
